name: vantage-orchestrator
description: An orchestrator skill that plans any mission into a wave-based DAG and deploys specialist sub-agents (researcher, ideation, implementation, website-build, auditor, frontend-tester) in parallel. It gates each wave through an auditor and runs autonomously under configurable autonomy and external-authority dials, with a non-negotiable safety floor and run-budget stop conditions. Ships a portable optimizer skill. Venture-agnostic: driven by a mission blueprint.
